productDisplayName: Puma Women Vesta Runner Wns White Sports Shoes
description: The classic heritage look of puma is applied in modern lightweight tooling for uber cool sporty-chic look in the form of Vesta Runner. The leather and nylon uppers give maximum protection and support, while the textured rubber rubber outsoles provide greater grip and stability. Upper Combination nylon and suede upper for durability and comfort Padded collar and tongue for snug comfort Patent-leather formstripe logo Fine mesh lining with a removable eco-OrthoLite footbed for all day comfort Midsole Low-profile, injected-moulded EVA midsole for added cushioning Outsole EverTrack rubber outsole compound with high abrasion-wear characteristics for durability
